title: Filter by date of the creation log and last updated column :date:
excerpt:
You can now filter by the date of the creation log column and the last updated column :date:
We listened to your feedback and recognised that only being able to filter by the person who created and/or last updated the it…

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
You can now filter by the date of the creation log column and the last updated column

We listened to your feedback and recognised that only being able to filter by the person who created and/or last updated the item, was a significant limitation. Now, data reporting has become a whole easier

Screen Shot 2023-10-31 at 12.58.00 pm693×310 18.5 KB

Was this on your feature wishlist? Let us know if you’ll be taking advantage of these new filter options

posts.author: Tamir (Tamir Blajchman)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes. This is peferct. Does the column needs to be configured in the board in order to filter in a dashboard?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Tamir!

Correct - the column must be present in the board, in order to utilise the filters in the dashboard
